positive: A stylized minimalist forest scene featuring bioluminescent glowing flora and fauna, depicted with strong, saturated emerald and sapphire blue accents against a deep, velvety midnight black background. The main subject is a central cluster of abstract, crystalline mushrooms and glowing vine formations, creating a strong, inviting focal point. Use clean, solid silhouettes and high contrast, suitable for apparel printing. The style should be modern illustrative, graphic novel art meets Art Nouveau, with clean lines and dramatic, controlled lighting coming from the glowing elements. Perfect composition for a centered, square print.
negative: blur, low resolution, text, watermark, logo, writing, artifacts, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, dirty, grainy, muted colors, photographic, photo-realistic, signature
